steps.title: Notice the eclipse contrast
steps.content: The first sentence describes a partial solar eclipse, where the Moon blocks only part of the Sun. The second describes a total solar eclipse, where the Moon completely blocks the Sun.

steps.title: Choose a contrast transition
steps.content: A signals result, B signals reinforcement, and C incorrectly suggests the events happened at the same time despite different dates. A contrast transition fits the shift from partial to total eclipse. The answer is D.
